name: enzo
description: Turn founder context and evidence into a routed council, explicit decision, editable artifacts, and outcome review.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-led founder decisions and outcome reviews
interface.longDescription: Move from company context and a reality scan through independent methodological lenses, explicit disagreement, founder choice, editable decision artifacts, and calibrated outcome review. The original experience audit and Vision Brief remain available as Enzo's product workroom.
defaultPrompt: Run the complete Enzo decision workflow for what this product should promise first.
Audit this experience, separate evidence from inference, and route the smallest useful council.
Turn my founder choice into a cited Decision Memo, 30-day plan, and outcome review.
